title: Persons eligible
doc_html:
§464.  Persons eligible

No parish or parish official shall, at the public expense, support or aid any persons as paupers, except such as are infirm, sick or disabled.
doc_text:
§464.  Persons eligible
No parish or parish official shall, at the public expense, support or aid any persons as paupers, except such as are infirm, sick or disabled.
